---
title: "Benchmarking nf-core/createtaxdb auxiliary files retrieval"
author: "James Fellows Yates"
format: html
---

## Introduction

In addition to the reference genome files themselves, most classifier database building tools require auxiliary taxonomy metadata files.

Not all classifiers use the same taxonomy files.
Therefore we will need to download and prepare a range of files for the building itself.

More information about what is contained by these files can be found on the [nf-core/createtaxdb FAQ](https://nf-co.re/createtaxdb/2.1.0/docs/usage/usage/faq/).

## Requirements

Command line tools used in this notebook includes:

- `curl` (v8.5.0 (x86_64-pc-linux-gnu))
- `gunzip` (gunzip (gzip) 1.10)
- `tar` (tar (GNU tar) 1.34)
- `awk` (GNU Awk 4.2.1, API: 2.0)

## Download and prepare files

### NCBI taxdump files

The most common set of auxiliary taxonomy metadata files used by the tools are from the NCBI servers:

- `names.dmp` from [`pub/taxonomy`](https://ftp.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pub/taxonomy/)
- `nodes.dmp` from  from [`pub/taxonomy`](https://ftp.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pub/taxonomy/)
- `nucl_gb.accession2taxid.gz` from [`pub/taxonomy/accession2taxid`](https://ftp.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pub/taxonomy/accession2taxid/)

While not used directly, we will also need to download the following, to make a variant of this file for DIAMOND.

- `prot.accession2taxid.gz` from [`pub/taxonomy/accession2taxid`](https://ftp.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pub/taxonomy/accession2taxid/)

We can download (2026-03-17) these with:

```{bash}
#| eval: false

## For nodes and names dmp files
curl -o taxdump.tar.gz https://ftp.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pub/taxonomy/taxdump.tar.gz

## for accession2taxid files
curl -o nucl_gb.accession2taxid.gz https://ftp.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pub/taxonomy/accession2taxid/nucl_gb.accession2taxid.gz
curl -o prot.accession2taxid.gz https://ftp.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/pub/taxonomy/accession2taxid/prot.accession2taxid.gz
 
gunzip *
tar xvf taxdump.tar
rm taxdmp.tar
```

### NCBI genome.sizes

We can download the NCBI genome-sizes file:

```{bash}
#| eval: false

curl -o species_genome_size.txt https://ftp.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/genomes/ASSEMBLY_REPORTS/species_genome_size.txt
gzip species_genome_size.txt
```

### Create nucl2taxid

To create a Kraken2 and co like `nucl2taxid` file, you can use the following `awk` command

```{bash}
#| eval: false

awk -v OFS='\t' 'NR>1 {print $2, $3}' nucl_gb.accession2taxid > nucl2taxid.map
```

### Create prot2taxid

To create a DIAMOND compatible `prot2taxid` file, you can use a similar `awk` command above, just retaining the header

```{bash}
#| eval: false

awk -v OFS='\t' '{print $2, $3}' prot.accession2taxid > prot2taxid.map
```

### Download MALT db

To get the MALT taxonomy mappings, we download from the MEGAN website, and unzip

```{bash}
#| eval: false

curl -o megan-nucl-Feb2022.db.zip https://software-ab.cs.uni-tuebingen.de/download/megan6/megan-nucl-Feb2022.db.zip
```
